descriptions.triage: Route users to the right place

actions.modifyTitle: Modify deployment - keeps same URL and name
actions.cloneTitle: Clone this deployment with a new name
actions.reassignTitle: Reassign to a different bot space
actions.replicasDescription: Adjust the number of bot replicas. More replicas handle more concurrent users. Sticky sessions ensure users stay connected to the same replica.

wizard.clickToBegin: Click a deployment button to begin
wizard.clickToUpdate: Click a deployment button to update

protocols.selectCapabilitiesDescription: Enable the protocols your bot needs. Combine multiple capabilities.
protocols.knowledgeBaseDescription: Answer questions using uploaded documents and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
protocols.formCollectionDescription: Conversational forms to collect information without AI seeing user data
protocols.appointmentBookingDescription: Route users to calendar providers like Calendly or Google calendar
protocols.triageRoutingDescription: Route users to specialized bots or human support based on their needs
protocols.opticalReadDescription: Extract structured data from an uploaded image using a vision-capable LLM
protocols.opticalReadProviderGate: Optical Read requires a vision-capable provider. Anthropic supported in v1; OpenAI and Gemini coming soon.
protocols.combinationFullService: Full-service bot: Answer questions, collect user info, and book appointments.
protocols.combinationQaData: Q&A + Data Collection: Answer questions from your knowledge base while gathering user information.
protocols.combinationQaBooking: Q&A + Booking: Answer questions and help users book appointments.
protocols.combinationIntakeBooking: Intake + Booking: Collect user information and schedule appointments.

preview.selectProtocolPrompt: Select capabilities on the left to see what your bot can do

medical.medicalKnowledgeDesc: Answer patient questions about symptoms, medications, procedures, and insurance
medical.medicalFormsDesc: Collect medical history, insurance, and consent through conversational forms
medical.medicalAppointmentsDesc: Book doctor visits, lab tests, and follow-ups with calendar integration
medical.medicalTriageDesc: Assess urgency and route patients to appropriate care level
medical.medicalKnowledgeFormDesc: Educate patients while collecting intake information
medical.medicalKnowledgeApptDesc: Explain services and help patients book the right appointment
medical.medicalTripleDesc: Complete intake flow: educate, collect info, and schedule in one conversation
medical.medicalAllDesc: Complete digital receptionist: triage, intake, education, and scheduling

legal.legalKnowledgeDesc: Answer questions about practice areas, processes, and fee structures
legal.legalFormsDesc: Collect case details, documents, and conflict check information
legal.legalTriageDesc: Route inquiries to the appropriate attorney or practice area
legal.legalKnowledgeFormDesc: Explain legal options while gathering case information
legal.legalAllDesc: Complete client services: intake, case evaluation, routing, and scheduling

retail.retailKnowledgeDesc: Answer questions about products, availability, policies, and sizing
retail.retailFormsDesc: Handle order lookups, returns, and warranty registrations
retail.retailAppointmentsDesc: Schedule personal shopping, pickups, and in-store services
retail.retailTriageDesc: Route customers to the right department or escalate issues
retail.retailAllDesc: Complete shopping assistant: product help, service booking, and support

realestate.realestateKnowledgeDesc: Answer questions about listings, neighborhoods, and buying process
realestate.realestateFormsDesc: Qualify buyers/sellers and capture property preferences
realestate.realestateAppointmentsDesc: Book property showings, open houses, and agent meetings
realestate.realestateTriageDesc: Match leads to the right agent based on needs and location
realestate.realestateAllDesc: Complete real estate assistant: listings, qualification, and scheduling

education.educationKnowledgeDesc: Answer questions about courses, admissions, financial aid, and campus life
education.educationFormsDesc: Collect enrollment, registration, and application information
education.educationAppointmentsDesc: Book advisor meetings, campus tours, and tutoring sessions
education.educationTriageDesc: Route inquiries to the right department or support team
education.educationAllDesc: Complete student services: information, applications, and scheduling

hospitality.hospitalityKnowledgeDesc: Answer questions about amenities, dining, activities, and local attractions
hospitality.hospitalityFormsDesc: Capture room preferences, dietary needs, and special occasion details before arrival
hospitality.hospitalityAppointmentsDesc: Book dining, spa, activities, and room service
hospitality.hospitalityTriageDesc: Route requests to the right department or escalate urgent issues
hospitality.hospitalityAllDesc: Complete guest services: information, reservations, and support

finance.financeKnowledgeDesc: Answer questions about accounts, loans, rates, and KYC requirements
finance.financeFormsDesc: Collect identity documents, verify customers, and complete regulatory onboarding
finance.financeAppointmentsDesc: Book meetings with advisors, loan officers, and specialists
finance.financeTriageDesc: Route to the right product specialist or escalate complex cases
finance.financeAllDesc: Complete digital onboarding: KYC verification, product matching, and advisor scheduling

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.description: Answer questions using your uploaded documents with RAG-powered retrieval

formGathering.title: Form Collection
formGathering.description: Progressively collect user information through natural conversation

appointments.title: Appointment Booking
appointments.description: Let users book meetings through calendar integrations

triage.title: Triage Routing
triage.description: Route users to specialized bots or human support based on their needs

singles.singleKnowledgeDesc: Answer questions using your uploaded documents with intelligent RAG-powered retrieval
singles.singleFormGatheringDesc: Progressively collect structured information through natural conversation
singles.singleAppointmentsDesc: Help users schedule meetings through calendar integrations like Calendly or Cal.com
singles.singleTriageDesc: Route users to the right destination based on intent, urgency, or topic
singles.singleOpticalReadDesc: Pull structured fields from an uploaded image — the model reads, the user reviews and submits

synergies.synergyKnowledgeFormDesc: Answer product questions to build trust, then capture interested leads with contextual forms
synergies.synergyKnowledgeAppointmentsDesc: Educate users about services/products, then let them book when ready
synergies.synergyKnowledgeTriageDesc: Self-serve answers for common questions, seamless handoff for complex issues
synergies.synergyKnowledgeOpticalReadDesc: Extract data from an uploaded image, then answer follow-up questions grounded in your knowledge base
synergies.synergyFormAppointmentsDesc: Collect qualifying information, then offer personalized appointment slots
synergies.synergyFormTriageDesc: Gather user details, then route to the perfect team member or department
synergies.synergyAppointmentsTriageDesc: Identify the right specialist for the user's needs, then book directly
synergies.synergyTriple1Desc: Complete sales journey: educate prospects, capture leads, and book qualified demos
synergies.synergyTriple2Desc: Self-service knowledge base, ticket creation, and intelligent escalation to agents
synergies.synergyTriple3Desc: Answer questions, match to the right expert, and enable direct calendar booking
synergies.synergyTriple4Desc: Structured intake forms, smart routing to teams, and automated scheduling
synergies.synergyAllDesc: Full-featured concierge: answer questions, collect data, route intelligently, and book appointments

opticalRead.label: Label
opticalRead.idNameInvalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores only
opticalRead.hintHelper: Optional: prime location or format. The hint is the load-bearing tuning primitive.
opticalRead.noFieldsYet: Add at least one extraction field to enable Optical Read.
opticalRead.providerNotSupported: Optical Read requires a vision-capable provider. Anthropic supported in v1; OpenAI and Gemini coming soon.
opticalRead.intro: Name the slots you want extracted. The model resolves them against its own visual prior — the optional hint primes location or format.
opticalRead.showUploadOnStart: Show upload button as a starter prompt
opticalRead.showUploadOnStartHelper: Renders an upload card alongside the bot's first-message suggestions. Skips the conversational warm-up — the user can upload immediately.
opticalRead.afterSubmitMessageHelper: Bot reply rendered in the chat after the user submits the extracted fields. Leave empty to skip.

botSummary.title: Bot Summary
botSummary.tooltipLine1: The bot summary helps other bots in your network understand what this bot does and what knowledge it holds.
botSummary.tooltipLine2: This enables smarter routing, triage, and multi-bot orchestration.

region.title: Deployment Region

region.infoDescription: The deployment region determines where your bot's infrastructure runs. Choosing a region closer to your users can improve response times. Individual deployments can override this default setting.

account.title: Account Information

account.deleteUserWarning: Permanently delete your account and all your personal data including bots, documents, and API keys. Your bot space memberships will be removed. This action cannot be undone.
